name: cpp-style-enforcer-codex
description: C++ code style enforcement for Codex using clang-format, cpplint, copyright headers, BOM handling, and commit-time checks.

interface.shortDescription: Enforce team C++ style automatically in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Records C++ edits without rewriting files, then batches clang-format, UTF-8 BOM normalization, copyright headers, and cpplint at turn completion. Commit-time checks remain read-only and block violations.
defaultPrompt: Configure C++ style enforcement for this project.
